objective: Objective: "En utilisant le Breakout et la gestion du risque non linéaire (SL/TP adaptes a la volatilite), développer une stratégie qui combine l'EMA, l'OBV et les ROC pour des gains significatifs sur TURTLEUSDC dans un temps de 4h. Les entrées doivent inclure l'angle entre le cours et le canal basé sur la volatilité implicite/realisee en fonction du risque, un filtre horaire adaptatif de liquidité pour éviter les moments d'instabilité, ainsi qu'un comportement aleatoire alternant entre profils risque serre et large selon la volatilité. La sortie doit inclure des stop-loss (SL) à {SL} et take profit (TP) à {TP}, tout en minimisant les impacts non souhaités grâce au risk management approprié.

iterations.hypothesis: Using Bollinger Band Breakout with ADX Trend Filter and On-Balance Volume to capture significant market movements in the TURTLEUSDC, minimizing unwanted effects through appropriate risk management.

code.validation_error_retry: [AST001] Erreur de syntaxe ligne 58: invalid syntax

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy aims to capture significant market movements in TURTLEUSDC using Bollinger Band Breakout, On-Balance Volume and Relative Strength Index. It incorporates an adaptive liquidty filter for stability, as well as a random switching between riskier and less risky profiles based on volatility. The SL/TP setup is used to minimize unwanted effects of the strategy while appropriate risk management is ensured. Potential weaknesses include potential false signals due to high noise in the data or market conditions, poor performance under certain volatilities and lack of diversification within the portfolio.
[Backup plan] If results are poor (negative return), we would consider a change in the SL/TP setup, possibly adjusting them based on volatility and incorporating additional filters. If results are mediocre (low Sharpe) with low returns but acceptable risk level, we could look into parameter adjustments such as changing ROC period or adding more indicators to improve performance. In case of failure, an alternative approach would be trying different combinations of Bollinger Bands Breakout, On-Balance Volume and Relative Strength Index in combination with other strategies.
